task: held-out multilingual (en+sa) audio → text, overall CER (lower=better), identical corpus
note: Genuine scale-up on identical multilingual data. The 1.13B core (projector-only) reaches 0.6818 overall CER vs the 200M+LoRA's 0.7424 — scale helps on the multilingual task. Trained on the RTX 5090 (Megatron-Core). Not fully apples-to-apples on adaptation (1.13B is projector-only, 200M has LoRA); a LoRA'd 1.13B is the next step.
